Title: The One with the Proposal: Part 1
Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Shana Goldberg-Meehan
Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Plot: Chandler's plan to propose to Monica at dinner is interrupted by Richard. Joey accidentally buys a boat at a silent auction. Ross and Elizabeth's relationship comes to a crossroad.
